{{/* Renders the API reference using definition.yaml files mounted at data/apis/crds//definition.yaml and example manifests from data/apis/examples/.yaml. Each CRD becomes an .api-ref block with Example / spec / status tabs. */}} {{ $crdFiles := $.Site.Data.apis.crds }} {{ $examples := $.Site.Data.apis.examples }} {{ range $plural, $dirContents := $crdFiles }} {{ $crd := $dirContents.definition }} {{ if not $crd }}{{ continue }}{{ end }} {{ $group := $crd.spec.group }} {{ $kind := $crd.spec.names.kind }} {{ $scope := $crd.spec.scope }} {{ $shorts := $crd.spec.names.shortNames }} {{ range $versionItem := $crd.spec.versions }} {{ if $versionItem.served }} {{ $version := $versionItem.name }} {{ $schema := $versionItem.schema.openAPIV3Schema }} {{ $topDesc := $schema.description }} {{ $specSchema := index $schema.properties "spec" }} {{ $statusSchema := index $schema.properties "status" }} {{ $kindSlug := $kind | lower }} {{ $exampleData := index $examples $plural }} {{ $manifest := "" }} {{ with $exampleData }}{{ $manifest = .manifest }}{{ end }}

{{ $kind }}

{{/* Metadata: group/version · scope · short names */}}
{{ $group }}/{{ $version }} {{ $scope }} {{ range $shorts }}{{ . }}{{ end }}
{{ with $topDesc }}

{{ . | markdownify }}

{{ end }} {{/* Tab bar */}}
    {{ if $manifest }}
    • {{ end }}
    • {{ with $statusSchema }}{{ if .properties }}
    • {{ end }}{{ end }}
{{/* Tab panes */}}
{{ if $manifest }}
{{ highlight $manifest "yaml" "linenos=false" }}
{{ end }}
{{ with $specSchema }}
{{ $req := .required }} {{ range $key, $val := .properties }} {{ partial "apiBuilder/processSpec" (dict "key" $key "contents" $val "page" $ "kind" (printf "%s-spec" $kind) "required" (in $req $key) ) }} {{ end }}
{{ end }}
{{ with $statusSchema }}{{ if .properties }}
{{ range $key, $val := .properties }} {{ partial "apiBuilder/processSpec" (dict "key" $key "contents" $val "page" $ "kind" (printf "%s-status" $kind) "required" false ) }} {{ end }}
{{ end }}{{ end }}
{{/* .tab-content */}}
{{/* .api-ref */}} {{ end }} {{ end }} {{ end }}
